allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('next-auth', p.dependencies['next-auth']\); console.log\('bcryptjs', p.dependencies['bcryptjs']\);")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./node_modules/bcryptjs/package.json'\); console.log\('version', p.version\); console.log\('types', p.types || p.typings || '\(none\)'\); console.log\('exports', JSON.stringify\(p.exports\)\);")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "port 3100 free" })

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3100,3101\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "port $port -> killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "port $port free" } })

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "killing $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "3100 free" })

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3100,3101\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "port $port -> kill $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "$port free" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 3100,3101\) { $c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "$port cleaned" } else { Write-Output "$port free" } })
PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { "PATH: $\($gh.Source\)"; gh --version | Select-Object -First 1; "--- auth ---"; gh auth status } else { "gh not on PATH" })

PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "FOUND: $\($g.Source\)"; gh auth status } else { "gh NOT FOUND on PATH" })
